name: Sunburgers
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the first six ingredients in a bowl and stir well.
2. Divide the mixture into 4 equal portions. Shape each portion into a patty that is 1/2 inch thick.
3. Coat a grill rack with cooking spray. Place the patties on the grill over hot coals.
4. Cook the patties for 4 minutes on each side or until they reach your desired level of doneness.
5. On the bottom half of each bun, place a lettuce leaf.
6. Top each bun with a patty, tomato slice, and onion rings.
7. Place the top halves of the buns on to complete the sandwiches.
8. Repeat the process with the remaining ingredients.
4 servings.
NOTE: Sunburgers can also be broiled. Coat a rack with cooking spray and place it in a shallow roasting pan. Place the patties on the rack, and broil 4 inches from the heat for 6 minutes on each side or until they reach your desired level of doneness.
Per serving: 35 calories, 29.5 grams protein, 34.4 grams carbohydrates, 10.9 grams fat, 64 milligrams cholesterol, 316 milligrams sodium.
